products.name: Soft Baby Lotion
products.description: A silky baby lotion that keeps skin soft and comfortable all day. Formulated to support the developing skin barrier.
products.how_to_use: Massage onto baby’s skin after bath or whenever required, focusing on dry areas.

products.name: Ultra Rich Baby Cream
products.description: A thick but spreadable baby cream for very dry patches. Helps comfort rough elbows, knees and cheeks.
products.how_to_use: Use a small amount on problem areas throughout the day or as a nightly intensive treatment.

products.name: Baby Barrier Cream
products.description: A protective barrier cream that helps prevent dryness and irritation in delicate areas. Creates a breathable shield on baby’s skin.
products.how_to_use: Apply a thin layer on clean, dry skin as often as needed, especially after diaper changes.

Hey! I think you'd really love this one:

**Gentle Baby Milk Powder Cleanser** by MilkCloud
Rs.540

If you've been struggling with finding a gentle cleanser for your little one's sensitive skin, this is exactly what you need. This soothing milk powder cleanser makes quick sponge baths a breeze, leaving your baby's skin feeling fresh and comfortable.

🌟 **What makes it special for you:**
• Visibly calms and soothes sensitive skin
• Gently cleanses without stripping natural oils
• Fragrance-free — no risk of irritation for reactive skin
• Irritant-free formula

🧴 **Best match for:**
Sensitive skin → Dry skin
Main concerns: Dryness, sensitive skin, dehydration

🌿 **The hero ingredients people talk about most:**
• Milk Proteins → Nourishes and moisturizes skin
• Rice Starch → Soothes and calms irritation
• Oat Flour → Gentle exfoliant for sensitive skin

**How most people use it:**
→ Mix with warm water to form a milky liquid, then sponge gently over baby's skin and pat dry.
→ Always follow with a moisturizer to lock in hydration!

💬 **Real customer love** (from 85 reviews averaging 4.2 ⭐)
Customers rave about how gentle and effective this cleanser is for their little ones' sensitive skin, making bath time a stress-free experience.
